data.title: Asia Pacific Wire & Cable Corporation Ltd. (Nasdaq: APWC) plans a rights offering to its shareholders, filing for an F-1 reg with the SEC.
data.description: On August 29, 2025, in Taipei, Asia Pacific Wire & Cable Corporation Limited made an announcement regarding its Registration Statement on Form F-1 (the “Registration Statement”) filed with the Securities and Exchange Commission (“SEC”). The company, listed as APWC on Nasdaq, revealed its plans for a proposed rights offering aimed at holders of its common shares. This move signifies the company's intent to provide existing shareholders with an opportunity to purchase additional shares at a set price.

data.title: El Salvador divides $678M Bitcoin into 14 wallets to mitigate quantum risk - 6,274 BTC moved for security.
data.description: Approximately 6,274 Bitcoin owned by El Salvador has been moved to 14 different wallet addresses in order to enhance security against potential quantum attacks.

data.title: Fermi America™ secures $350M funding led by Macquarie Group for HyperGrid™ Project in Texas.
data.description: A company based in Amarillo, Texas known as Fermi America™ has revealed their latest project, the HyperGrid™ Project. This ambitious endeavor involves creating the world's largest artificial intelligence private grid campus that will be located behind-the-meter. Partnering with the Texas Tech University System, Fermi America™ recently completed a funding round, securing a total of $100 million for the project. This initiative represents a significant leap in advancing technology and infrastructure in the region.

data.title: Spirit Blockchain Capital reports H1 & Q2 2025 results, including SpiritLinQ launch and SpiritReserve Group initiative.
data.description: Vancouver-based company Spirit Blockchain Capital Inc. (CSE: SPIR) has disclosed its latest achievements and unaudited financial results for the quarter concluding on June 30, 2025. They have also shared important strategic updates, including the introduction of Exchange Traded Products (ETPs) by Spirit Digital AG, readiness of "SpiritLinQ" deployment, and the official commencement of SpiritReserve Group, a program aimed at generating yields through treasury operations.

data.title: Study by Deploy Action and Kevala/Gridlabs finds California could save $13.7 billion by doubling load-shifting goals.
data.description: In Sacramento, California on August 29, 2025, it was reported that by increasing California's strategic load-shifting objectives, the state could potentially avoid spending up to $13.7 billion on grid upgrades. A study conducted by Deploy Action and GridLab/Kevala revealed this finding, highlighting significant potential savings for the state.

data.title: MSP Recovery secures strategic term sheet for liquidity & growth, targets future expansion with working capital.
data.description: MSP Recovery has revealed a strategic term sheet that offers prospective liquidity and working capital to boost future growth efforts. This move is designed to provide much-needed support to the company, with an emphasis on driving expansion and success. Key figures in this announcement include important financial details and other significant numbers that will play a vital role in shaping MSP Recovery's trajectory moving forward.

data.title: FDA approved Leqembi subcutaneous formulation for Alzheimer's, paving way for combination therapies; Aug. 29, 2025.
data.description: The FDA has recently approved a subcutaneous formulation, paving the way for increased accessibility and potential for at-home administration. This delivery method follows the successful model of diabetes and GLP-1 drugs. The approval by the FDA, announced on August 29, 2025, marks a significant development in the medical field. This new formulation offers ease of use and convenience for patients, with the potential to revolutionize healthcare delivery.
Solar Alliance Energy, Inc. reports Q2 earnings amidst tough times for solar sector. #renewables #finance

data.title: Integris Composites promotes defense armor at Pacific Future Forum in Tokyo on Aug. 29-30 aboard HMS Prince of Wales.
data.description: Integris Composites, based in Tysons Corner, Virginia, has been actively promoting their defense armor and survivability solutions worldwide. They are currently attending the Pacific Future Forum 2025 on August 29-30, located on board the HMS Prince of Wales in Tokyo. This event serves as a platform for Integris to showcase their products and services to a global audience. The company aims to enhance its presence in the defense industry and highlight its innovative offerings.
Daly Believes Tariff-Related Price Increases Are Temporary, Not One-Time

data.title: Appeals court invalidates Trump's tariffs in a major setback to his trade policies. Duties upheld for now pending likely Supreme Court appeal.
data.description: The recent ruling represents a significant setback to President Trump's trade agenda. However, the judges have opted to maintain the tariffs, giving room for a potential appeal to the Supreme Court.

data.title: Tether cancels plan to freeze USDT on 5 blockchains, including Omni, BCH SLP, Kusama, EOS, and Algorand, keeping it operational in a limited manner.
data.description: Tether has decided against discontinuing USDT on Omni, Bitcoin Cash SLP, Kusama, EOS, and Algorand. This reversal enables USDT to remain operational on these platforms to a certain extent.

data.title: Prime Drink Group Corp voluntarily applied for a MCTO and granted an extension to file Annual Financial Filings by Sept 29, 2025.
data.description: Montreal-based Prime Drink Group Corp. (CSE: PRME) has voluntarily requested and received a management cease trade order (MCTO) from the British Columbia Securities Commission (BCSC), their principal regulator. This order, issued on July 30, 2025, extends the deadline for filing their annual financial statements for the period ended March 31, 2025, along with related documents, to September 29, 2025. This follows previous announcements on July 30, 2025 and August 15, 2025. The MCTO was granted under National Policy 12-203 Management Cease Trade Orders (NP 12-203).

data.title: Federal appeals court rules most Trump tariffs are illegal, Trump warns of destruction, tariffs to remain for now.
data.description: On Friday night, a federal appeals court declared that the majority of President Donald Trump's tariffs are unlawful. Despite this ruling, the tariffs imposed by Trump will remain effective at the moment. Trump expressed concerns that this decision could potentially devastate the nation. The court's decision was detailed in a report titled "Most Trump Tariffs Ruled Illegal By Federal Appeals Court," available on Investor's Business Daily's platform.

data.title: Foresight Diagnostics and Roche settle dispute through licensing agreement for PhasED-Seq™ technology in Non-Hodgkin's Lymphoma.
data.description: Today, Foresight Diagnostics revealed an agreement with Roche Molecular Systems and Roche Sequencing Systems, marking the end of their legal dispute. The agreement involves a limited licensing deal and was announced on August 29, 2025 in Boulder, Colorado. This resolution will pave the way for cooperation between the parties, putting an end to the legal battle and facilitating collaboration in the future.

data.title: Premium Global Income Split Corp. reports $0.46M increase in net assets, with $21.79M total assets as of June 30, 2025, paying $0.38 Preferred and $0.48 Class A share distributions.
data.description: Premium Global Income Split Corp, listed as PGIC on TSX, disclosed its financial performance for the half-year ending June 30, 2025. The net assets for Class A shareholders saw a $0.46 million increase, equivalent to $0.25 per Class A share. As of June 30, 2025, the net assets attributable to Class A shareholders stood at $21.79 million, or $6.38 per Class A share. During this period, cash distributions were made at a rate of $0.38 per Preferred share and $0.48 per Class A share.

data.title: Eliza Labs is suing xAI over licensing fees, threatening legal action if demands aren't met. AI founder Shaw Walters announced.
data.description: Shaw Walters, the founder of Eliza Labs, stated that xAI is requiring higher licensing fees from the agentic AI platform. Failure to comply could result in legal consequences.
Dividends being paid to shareholders of BDRs.

data.title: Firstfund (TSXV: FFP) reports $64,991 net income for Q2 2025, with $70,087 unrealized gain on Vitality Products Inc.
data.description: VANCOUVER, BC, Aug. 29, 2025 - Consolidated Firstfund Capital Corp. (TSXV: FFP) has reported their financial results for the three months ending June 30, 2025. The Company recorded a net income of $64,991 or $0.01 per share, a significant turnaround from the net loss of $59,522 or $0.01 per share reported in the same period in 2024. Additionally, there was an unrealized net gain of $70,087 in the most recent quarter, compared to an unrealized net loss of $70,086 in 2024, attributed to the revaluation of the investments in Vitality Products Inc. (TSXV). Details of this story are available on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Elon Musk's attorney to lead $200M Dogecoin fund, sponsored by House of Doge, as meme coin treasuries rise.
data.description: Alex Spiro, the lawyer of Elon Musk, has been appointed as the chairman of a forthcoming Dogecoin treasury company with a $200 million backing from House of Doge. This move signifies the rise of memecoin treasury entities in the market.
